arts.ttl: Lecce vs. Juventus, important points up for grabs
arts.sum: Lecce have lost each of their last five Serie A matches against Juventus by an aggregate score of 11-1; the Giallorossi have never before suffered six consecutive losses against the Bianconeri in the top-flight (also five between 2004 and 2008). Juventus have already recorded four 0-0 draws in the league this season, as many as across the entire 2023/24 Serie A campaign; the Bianconeri last had more goalless draws in a single Serie A season in 2011-12 (5 under Antonio Conte).

arts.ttl: Napoli eye Juventus Defender Danilo as top target
arts.sum: Napoli are gearing up for the winter transfer window, with Antonio Conte’s squad looking to bolster their defensive lineup. The current Serie A leaders have set their sights on Juventus defender Danilo as one of their prime targets. Gianluca Di Marzio reports how the Brazilian international, who is set to return to the starting lineup for Juventus in their upcoming match against Lecce, faces a period of reflection regarding his future in January. Once a pivotal figure in Massimiliano Allegri’s plans, Danilo has found himself on the fringes under new manager Thiago Motta. Napoli’s interest in Danilo is no secret, The post Napoli eye Juventus Defender Danilo as top target appeared first on FootItalia.com.
